title: Vanilla Woodland Mansion Desktop [TARDIS Refined]
description: A Desktop made from a Vanilla Generated Woodland Mansion for TARDIS Refined
body:
A Custom TARDIS Desktop made from a Vanilla Generated Stronghold for the Mod TARDIS Refined

Equipped with various rooms of chests, trees and other Mansion amenities

This is a large Desktop and obviously isn't exactly balanced, but it's funny.

Console is up the Main Stairs facing the door



An issue I couldn't quite figure out how to resolve is that the Air lock replaced its surrounding blocks with air, to resolve this you can use the following two commands *While you are in the TARDIS*

`/fill 11 89 42 4 85 36 minecraft:dark_oak_planks replace air`

`/fill 9 85 37 7 87 40 air`
